# FI0-10647 — Processing Statement: Prevent “description-only” products

## Summary
- Problem: Processing Statement (PS) products can be submitted with only a product description and no details (species/catches/certificates). This produces empty product sections on Check Your Answers and in the generated PDF.
- Goal: Block submission when any PS product has description-only content, ensuring each product includes required details.

## Acceptance Criteria
- Block submission if any product in a PS has only description text and lacks required detail fields
- Surface a clear error message (suggested): “Add product details (species and catches/certificates) for each product.”
- Ensure Check Your Answers never shows empty product sections
- Ensure PDFs never include products without details
- Works for both newly created documents and copied documents


### Scenario 1: New PS with one complete product and one description-only product
- Given the user starts a new Processing Statement document
 and the user adds the first product with all required details (species, catches/certificates, weights)
and the user adds a second product with only a product description and no species/catches/certificates
- When the user navigates to Back to your progress and the user submits the PS document then the submission is blocked with a validation error indicating product details are required.  This error message should be generic and same as the one that appears when no products are added at all
- And the Check Your Answers page does not display an empty product section
- And no PDF is generated for a document containing description-only products

### Scenario 2: Copied PS containing only a description-only product
- Given the user copies an existing PS document
- And the copied document retains only a product description with no species/catches/certificates
- When the user navigates to Back to your progress
- And the user submits the PS document
- Then the submission is blocked with a validation error indicating product details are required
- And the Check Your Answers page does not display an empty product section
- And no PDF is generated for a document containing description-only products

### Scenario 3: All products valid — submission succeeds
- Given the user has a PS document where every product has required details (species, catches/certificates, weights)
- When the user navigates to Back to your progress
- And the user submits the PS document
- Then the submission succeeds
- And the Check Your Answers page shows products with their details
- And the generated PDF contains only products with details (no empty sections)

### Scenario 4: Validation on catch-added page
- If there is any product with only description text and no species/catches/certificates on this pgae catch-added, example create-processing-statement/GBR-2026-PS-8D3613098/catch-added, and the user clieck on save ande continue, then the user should see a validation error at the top of the page indicating that product details are required

## Test
- Add/update test in the frontend as necessary to cover the new validation logic
- Add/update test in the backend as necessary to cover the new validation logic

## Notes for Implementation (backend validation)
- Add a guard on PS submission to reject any product that only contains description text with no species/catches/certificates
- Reference (for awareness): validation can be added when transforming/sending the PS payload (e.g., blocking at orchestration-to-boomi stage)
